title: New Chinese Tea Packaging Hero Poster AI
sourceTitle: New Chinese Tea Packaging Hero Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 premium new-Chinese tea beverage packaging hero poster for fictional white peach jasmine cold-brew tea with petals, translucent tea, soft cloud and fruit elements, featuring LUMA TEA / PEACH JASMINE. Subject: fictional white peach jasmine cold-brew tea with petals, translucent tea, soft cloud and fruit elements is the central tea product, shown as a complete full-height cup or bottle with refined packaging, visible lid-to-base proportions, flavor-inspired graphics, and premium commercial photography texture. Scene: new-Chinese product photography poster, premium whitespace and readable brand title provides the mature launch-campaign setting with oriental whitespace, soft gradients, rice-paper texture, ink-wash forms, flavor props, and restrained material atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical product poster layout: top brand information area, large product name in the upper middle, centered full product cup or bottle as the absolute hero, small selling-point text on the sides, and bottom flavor props that support the taste without overpowering the packaging. Signature Elements: Full centered drink packaging, oriental negative space, giant title area, flavor-specific props, original cup graphics, soft gradients, ink-wash or paper texture, magazine layout, and premium mature tea-brand launch mood. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Palette follows the product flavor while staying elegant: soft main brand color, warm ivory or rice-paper neutrals, restrained gold or ink accents, natural tea and fruit tones, and clean readable dark text. Lighting: Soft commercial product lighting, delicate cup highlights, condensation or material sheen where relevant, gentle shadows on props, and polished launch-poster depth. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Paper cup, frosted cup, premium plastic or glass bottle, refined label print, ink texture, botanical illustration, fruit or tea props, rice paper, porcelain, stone, water ripple, mist, petals, leaves, and subtle packaging embossing. Typography: LUMA TEA / PEACH JASMINE appears as the brand name, series or product title, short subtitle, and compact side labels; typography should be large, readable, editorial, and integrated with the new-Chinese layout. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
